page_metadata.biotools__summary: HelixCorr is a software to predict correlated mutations specifically for the transmembrane parts of membrane proteins. It includes predictions obtained by several individual prediction algorithms and combines them to a consensus prediction.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: HelixCorr is a software to predict correlated mutations specifically for the transmembrane parts of membrane proteins. It includes predictions obtained by several individual prediction algorithms and combines them to a consensus prediction.
